Title: A ribonuclease T2 protein FocRnt2 contributes to the virulence of Fusarium oxysporum f. sp. cubense tropical race 4

Common_Genes.Source_Species_Latin_Name: Fusarium oxysporum f. sp. cubense tropical race 4
Common_Genes.Applied_Species_Latin_Name: Fusarium oxysporum f. sp. cubense tropical race 4; Musa spp.; Nicotiana benthamiana
Common_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Function: Contributes to fungal virulence in banana Fusarium wilt
Common_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Accumulation_Site: Fungal culture medium / infected banana system
Common_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Promotes fusaric acid accumulation and full virulence; deletion reduces fusaric acid biosynthesis and attenuates infection
Common_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Source_Species: Strongly induced by banana root extracts; highly expressed during early infection, peaking at 24 h post-induction in vitro and 4 days after inoculation in planta; low in conidia and mycelia
Common_Genes.Subcellular_Localization: Nucleus and cytoplasm in Nicotiana benthamiana; secreted protein with N-terminal signal peptide
Common_Genes.Protein_Family_or_Domain: RNase T2 family protein; ribonuclease T2 domain; secreted effector candidate
Common_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: Secretome-based candidate identification; recombinant protein RNase assay; yeast signal peptide secretion assay; transient expression in Nicotiana benthamiana; gene deletion by homologous recombination; complementation; RT-qPCR of fusaric acid biosynthetic genes; fusaric acid quantification; pathogenicity assay; fungal biomass assay; confocal infection observation
Common_Genes.Applied_Promoters: Native promoter for complementation in Foc TR4; CaMV 35S-derived agroexpression vectors pBI121/pEarley103 for transient expression in Nicotiana benthamiana
Common_Genes.Environment_or_Treatment_Factor: Banana root extract induction; infection of susceptible banana cultivar Brazilian; CD medium supplemented with banana extracts for fusaric acid assay
Common_Genes.Potential_Tradeoffs: Deletion had little effect on hyphal growth, colony morphology, conidiation, or sensitivity to oxidative, osmotic, and cell wall stresses
Common_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Potential antifungal target for reducing fusaric acid production and virulence in banana wilt pathosystem
Common_Genes.Omics_Data: Previous secretome analysis identified FocRnt2 as a candidate effector; accession NA
Common_Genes.Other_Important_Info: Suppresses SA- and JA-associated defense marker genes and BAX-induced ROS/cell death in Nicotiana benthamiana; deletion increases defense-related gene expression in banana; also slows root colonization and expansion
Common_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. FocRnt2 encodes a secreted RNase T2 protein with in vitro RNase activity. 2. FocRnt2 is highly induced during early banana infection and suppresses host immune responses. 3. Deletion of FocRnt2 reduces fusaric acid biosynthesis gene expression and fusaric acid content, delaying root colonization and lowering virulence without affecting fungal growth or stress tolerance.
